trigger_reason: R786 is rank by mechanical-PASS proximity in E32 (post-filter architectural candidate with kw=2; tree-stream max sim=0.40). Per program_v10.md §2.5 (preserved in v11/v12/v13), top-3 rounds receive full step-13 spec.
candidate_stripped: Symplectic-capacity gating module: new learnable module computing a symplectic-capacity invariant (Ekeland-Hofer / Liouville) on a learnable 2-form pulled back from the latent; capacity value gates the inter-layer pathway.

A_candidate.name: Symplectic-capacity gating module
A_candidate.description: Insert a new symplectic-capacity gating module in each layer; the module learns a 2-form ω = Σ a_ij dq_i ∧ dp_j from the layer's latent (Q-K splitting); the symplectic capacity is computed via a learnable approximation (gradient flow), and the capacity value gates the inter-layer pathway via a sigmoid.

B_control.name: Same architecture WITHOUT the symplectic-capacity gating module
B_control.distinctive_parameter_value: no new module / standard residual connection

metric.name: validation BLEU + GLUE SST-2 accuracy across 3 seeds

statistical_test.name: paired t-test A vs B + A vs C

distinguishability_pre_check.rationale: Symplectic capacity is a topological invariant of the 2-form ω; if ω is small (near zero), capacity collapses to a constant near-zero value (~0.1 nm units), and the gate behaves like a sigmoid with constant input — identical to a standard learned-temperature gate. The architectural distinguishability depends on whether the 2-form coefficients learn to be non-trivial during training, which is empirically uncertain.
distinguishability_pre_check.v12_observation: Step 05.5 PASS = architectural-topology-change; candidate has new learnable module with new 2-form parameters. However, the empirical distinguishability depends on training dynamics (whether ω learns to be non-trivial).

notes_for_executor: R786's architectural-topology candidate is structurally distinct at construction time (new 2-form module), but its empirical distinguishability is uncertain because the symplectic capacity's information content depends on the 2-form being non-trivial — a property that training may or may not enforce.
